_comment: Tile layout for the ada_asm App Insights dashboard. Provisioned by modules/dashboard.bicep. Each tile pins a kusto query against the linked App Insights instance.

content.Query: requests | where cloud_RoleName == 'ada-asm-backend' | summarize p50=percentile(duration,50), p95=percentile(duration,95), p99=percentile(duration,99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
requests | where cloud_RoleName == 'ada-asm-backend' | summarize total=count(), errors=countif(resultCode startswith '5') by bin(timestamp, 5m) | extend error_rate = todouble(errors) / total

2._comment: Supplier sync success rate per day

content.Query: customEvents | where name == 'supplier_sync.run.finalised' | summarize success=countif(customDimensions.status=='success'), total=count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), tostring(customDimensions.supplier)

customEvents | where name in ('supplier_lookup.cache.hit', 'supplier_lookup.cache.miss') | summarize hits=countif(name=='supplier_lookup.cache.hit'), misses=countif(name=='supplier_lookup.cache.miss') by bin(timestamp, 1h) | extend hit_ratio = todouble(hits) / (hits + misses)
pageViews | summarize views=count(), unique_users=dcount(user_Id) by bin(timestamp, 1h), name | order by timestamp desc
